marketing.title: kInorA
marketing.subtitle: Personalized training powered by AI
marketing.cinemaAlt: Athlete taking an active break between sets, sitting on the gym floor with hands resting on knees
marketing.comoImgAlt: Woman performing a loaded barbell squat in the gym, with correct posture and full concentration
marketing.strengthImgAlt: Chalked hands gripping a barbell before a lift, ready to execute the movement

hero.title: Your personal trainer,
hero.subtitle: kInorA listens to you, builds your routine, and adjusts it every week based on your progress. Train with a plan that evolves with you, not a generic one.

schedule.title: Adapts to your schedule
schedule.desc: Set the days you can train and the AI reorganizes your week.

level.title: Plan for your level
level.desc: From beginner to advanced, with progressive overload.

equipment.title: No equipment required
equipment.desc: Train at home, in the park, or at the gym.

hands.title: Hands-free
hands.desc: Control your session by voice while you train.

hiw.title: From your goal to your routine in three steps
hiw.subtitle: No generic templates. Tell kInorA what you want to achieve and it builds a custom plan that improves with you.

step1.title: Tell it your goal
step1.desc: Speak or type: gain strength, lose fat, run farther. The AI learns your level, availability, and equipment.

step2.title: AI builds your plan
step2.desc: In seconds you get a weekly routine with exercises, sets, reps, and rest designed for you.

step3.title: Train and improve every week
step3.desc: Log your sessions and the AI adjusts loads and volume so you keep progressing without plateauing.

features.title: Everything you need, in one app
features.subtitle: The tools a personal trainer would give you, available every day at any hour.

adaptive.title: Adaptive plan
adaptive.desc: Routines that readjust each week based on your progress, fatigue, and actual availability.

voice.title: Voice assistant
voice.desc: Mark sets, request an exercise change, or start your rest timer without touching the screen.

tracking.title: Live tracking
tracking.desc: Rest timer, set logging, and exercise guidance throughout your entire session.

stats.title: Statistics
stats.desc: Visualize your volume, strength, and consistency with clear, easy-to-read charts.

strength.title: Every kilo lifted, recorded
strength.desc: kInorA keeps track of your loads and adjusts progression intelligently. No spreadsheets, no guessing. Just steady progress week after week.

pricing.title: Start free, grow when you're ready
pricing.subtitle: No commitment. Change or cancel your plan anytime from the app.

team.feat1: Everything in Pro for your team

cta.title: Your next routine is waiting
cta.subtitle: Create your plan in under a minute. Free, no credit card.

footer.tagline: The AI coach that builds your plan, adjusts it every week, and trains with you.

phone.ariaLabel: App preview showing today's workout, weekly streak, and progress

generating.title: Generating your plan…
generating.desc: Your personalized workout plan is being created. This usually takes about 30 seconds.

failed.title: Plan generation failed
failed.desc: Something went wrong while generating your plan. You can try again.

empty.title: No plan yet
empty.desc: Create your personalized workout plan to get started.

plan.est_duration: est. {n, plural, one {# min} other {# min}}

start.conflict: You have an active session for {plan} · Day {n}. Resume or finish it before starting another.
start.conflict_no_day: You have an active session for {plan}. Resume or finish it before starting another.
start.conflict_generic: You already have an active workout session. Resume or finish it before starting another.

error.title: Connection problem
error.desc: We lost the live connection and could not fetch your plan status. Check your connection or sign in again, then retry.

error.start: We couldn't start the session. Please try again.
error.record: We couldn't save the set. Please try again.
error.complete: We couldn't complete the workout. Please try again.
error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

sync.reload_required: Your saved changes are safe, but you need to reload the page to finish syncing.
sync.auth_required: Your session expired while syncing. Your changes are still saved locally — reload the page or sign in again to finish syncing.
sync.dropped: Some of your changes couldn't be saved and were discarded because the server rejected them. Please redo those changes.

meta.done: {n, plural, one {# set · completed} other {# sets · completed}}
meta.active: {n, plural, one {Set # of {m} · in progress} other {Set # of {m} · in progress}}
meta.pending: {n, plural, one {# set · pending} other {# sets · pending}}

aiNote.heading: Suggested microadjust
aiNote.stub: AI coaching insights will appear here once available.

step.limitationsTitle: Any limitations to keep in mind?

equipment.errorDuplicate: That equipment is already in your list.

resistanceBands.label: Resistance bands
resistanceBands.alt: A set of elastic resistance bands

barbell.label: Barbell
barbell.alt: An Olympic barbell loaded with plates

cableMachine.label: Cable machine
cableMachine.alt: A cable pulley station in a gym

smithMachine.label: Smith machine
smithMachine.alt: A Smith machine with guided barbell rails

bodyweight.label: Bodyweight only
bodyweight.alt: An athlete doing a one-arm push-up

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.heroLead: Keep your streak going and close this week's plan.
dashboard.weeklySubPending: {remaining} session(s) left to close this week
dashboard.emptyBody: Create a plan or start a workout to see your progress here.

exercises.title: Exercises
exercises.description: Browse and search the exercise library for your workouts.

stats.title: Statistics
stats.description: Track your progress and review your training history.
stats.volumeTrendEmpty: Not enough data yet to show a trend.

trend.up: Volume up {volume} kg vs. prior session
trend.down: Volume down {volume} kg vs. prior session

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Manage your account settings and preferences.

offline.title: You're Offline
offline.description: It looks like you're currently disconnected from the internet. Please check your connection and try again.
offline.syncNote: Your data will be synced once you're back online.

complete.title: Session completed
complete.body: Great work! We've logged your workout.

error.load: We couldn't load the session. Please try again.
error.start: We couldn't start the session. Please try again.
error.record: We couldn't save the set. Please try again.
error.complete: We couldn't finish the session. Please try again.

conflict.withScope: You already have an active session in "{planName}" (Day {day}). Finish it before starting another.
conflict.withPlan: You already have an active session in "{planName}". Finish it before starting another.
conflict.generic: You already have an active session. Finish it before starting another.
